configuration-properties.doc:name: Configuration Properties
configuration-properties.doc:description: Loads HTTP host and port settings from config.yaml

http:listener-config.name: HTTP_Listener_config
http:listener-config.doc:name: HTTP Listener Config
http:listener-config.doc:description: HTTP Listener configuration exposing the greeting API on host 0.0.0.0 port 8081

http:listener-connection.doc:description: Configures the HTTP listener connection using host and port from property placeholders

flow.name: user-greeting-flow
flow.doc:name: User Greeting Flow
flow.doc:description: Receives HTTP GET requests on /greet and returns a personalized JSON greeting message

http:listener.doc:name: GET /greet
http:listener.doc:description: Listens for HTTP GET requests on the /greet endpoint accepting an optional name query parameter

http:response.doc:description: Defines the 200 OK response with JSON content-type header for successful greeting requests

http:error-response.doc:description: Defines the 500 error response with JSON body containing the error description

logger.doc:name: Log incoming request
logger.doc:description: Logs the name query parameter from the incoming GET /greet request

set-variable.doc:name: Extract user name
set-variable.doc:description: Extracts the name query parameter from the request, defaulting to Guest if not provided

set-payload.value: #[output application/json --- { greeting: 'Hello, ' ++ vars.userName ++ '!', message: 'Welcome to MuleVibes Greeting API' }]
set-payload.doc:name: Build greeting response
set-payload.doc:description: Constructs a JSON greeting response with a personalised message using the provided name

logger.doc:name: Log greeting response
logger.doc:description: Logs the outgoing greeting response for monitoring purposes

error-handler.doc:description: Handles runtime errors in the greeting flow, returning a structured JSON error response

on-error-propagate.doc:name: Handle any error
on-error-propagate.doc:description: Catches any unhandled error in the greeting flow and returns a JSON error response

logger.doc:name: Log error
logger.doc:description: Logs the error description for debugging and monitoring

set-payload.doc:name: Set error payload
set-payload.doc:description: Sets a JSON error response payload containing the error description and type
